title: Dengar and the Destroyers
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dengar and the Destroyers''' was a [[Band/Legends|band]] that occasionally played at [[Bantha Traxx]] on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]. Their signature [[Music/Legends|song]] was "[[Where Did All the Killiks Go?]]."

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-05-12 -->''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]''
